subject: Where is my order?
body: My order ORD-1003 was supposed to arrive days ago, still nothing.

subject: Order status check
body: Can you tell me the status of ORD-1002? Just want to confirm it arrived.

subject: How long does shipping take?
body: I haven't ordered yet but want to know your standard shipping timeframe before I do.

subject: Refund question
body: I bought something 10 days ago and it's unused in original packaging. Can I get a refund?

subject: My account got suspended for no reason
body: I tried to log in and my account is suspended. This is unacceptable, I want it reinstated immediately.

subject: Charge dispute - this is fraud
body: I was charged twice for the same order and nobody is responding. I will be contacting my bank and a lawyer if this isn't fixed today.

subject: Refund denied unfairly
body: Your team denied my refund request but I believe I qualify under your policy. I want this reviewed by someone senior.

subject: App crashes on checkout
body: The app crashes every time I try to check out with a saved card. Happens every time, on every attempt.

subject: Search feature is broken
body: The search bar returns no results for any query I try, even for products I know exist.

subject: Notifications not working
body: I stopped receiving push notifications after the last app update. Would like this looked into.

subject: Password reset email not arriving
body: I requested a password reset but never got the email. I checked spam already, still nothing.
